expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly targets all three focus areas: (1) dashboard-level export paths vs other contexts: "Dashboard: export to Google Sheets from dashboard-level export entry" and "Dashboard vs Application/Report settings: dashboard-level Google Sheets export path remains distinct"; (2) option combinations: "Dashboard: export options combinations are selectable" with steps to "Toggle each available option" and "Select a representative combination of multiple options"; (3) visible completion outcomes: "Dashboard: successful Google Sheets export shows visible completion outcome" asserting "visible in-progress indicator" and "visible success outcome" plus file/link presentation.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md states "Primary phase targeted - Phase 4a" and notes "Subcategory-first structure used". result.md is a scenario draft in an XMindMark-like hierarchy with subcategory headers (e.g., "Dashboard export — Google Sheets") and atomic, nested, observable verification leaves (e.g., "A visible in-progress indicator is shown" / "Export completes with a visible success outcome"), which matches phase 4a scenario-draft expectations.
